overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge navigating through stormy seas at night. The scene features functional navigation displays including radar and nautical charts, with the ship's bow cutting through choppy waters as lightning periodically illuminates the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge interior with navigation controls

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems while moving forward through stormy seas

entered.detail: Navigation display showing nautical charts with colored depth zones and vessel position
Circular radar display with rotating sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
Sonar or depth finder display showing underwater terrain profile
The bow and forward deck of the vessel visible through the bridge windows
Metal structural framing of the bridge windows
Choppy dark water with visible wave movement surrounding the vessel

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from inside a ship's bridge, looking out over the vessel's bow as it moves through stormy nighttime waters. Three navigation monitors display charts, radar, and depth data while the ship advances steadily through the choppy seas.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge interior with navigation controls

events.description: Lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface on the left side of the vessel

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the ship forward through the storm

segments.scene_description: The ship continues moving forward through the stormy seas. A bright lightning flash occurs on the left horizon at approximately 9.5 seconds, briefly illuminating the choppy water surface before returning to darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge interior with navigation controls

events.description: Second lightning strike visible on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the stormy conditions

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued navigation through the storm with the ship's radar actively sweeping. A second lightning flash occurs around the 17-second mark, again lighting up the ocean surface on the left as the vessel maintains its forward progress through the rough seas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, stormy ocean punctuated by sudden bursts of light. It begins with a steady view over the vessel's bow, where the glow of navigation monitors displaying radar and nautical charts contrasts with the oppressive darkness of the choppy seas. As the ship advances, the gloom is momentarily shattered by a bright lightning flash on the left horizon that briefly illuminates the turbulent water surface. The scene then returns to darkness while the radar continues its active sweep, before a second flash of lightning again lights up the ocean to the left. The camera maintains its forward progress, capturing the rhythmic cycle of deep shadow and electric brilliance as the vessel pushes through the rough nighttime waters.
